Can't remember if it's this building, but there's a nice old fashioned crabapple right up against one of the buildings in this area of the Womack complex on the MTSU campus. Access: Public.
Nice old fashioned crabapple tree. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Between Peck Hall and Cope Administration building on MTSU campus. About a dozen black walnut trees; great yield, but high competition from squirrels. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-December.
Womack Housing on MTSU campus. Yields a lot of shells, but I've always found them to be empty or shrivelled. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.

3-4 between Peck Hall and JUB. Great yield every 3rd year, fair or no yield on other years. Delicious nuts, but squirrels are quick to get them. Shells are even harder than shagbark. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
1323 E Main St, Murfreesboro, TN 37132, USA
Cluster of 3 or 4 on MTSU campus at entrance to Wood-Steagall parking lot. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
Baird Ln & Alumni Dr. MTSU, Murfreesboro, TN 37130, USA
2022 was a good fruit year; 2023 plant was hit with cedar rust so all fruit looked affected (orange hair) Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
